name: Appointment Reminders (Django)
description: Appointment Reminders in Django with Telnyx

TELNYX_API_KEY.description: Your Telnyx API Key, you can find at: https://portal.telnyx.com/#/app/api-keys

TELNYX_PHONE_NUMBER.description: The Telnyx phone number you are using for this app. You can get one here: https://portal.telnyx.com/#/app/numbers

TELNYX_MESSAGING_PROFILE_ID.description: Your Telnyx Messaging Profile ID, you can create one at: https://portal.telnyx.com/#/app/messaging

DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE.description: Instructs our app to use the production settings module

DJANGO_SECRET_KEY.description: A unique, unpredictable key for your Django app
